config.script:
import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/allow_remote"
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/allow_remote"
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = 1
        	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == 1:
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)

import time
    
    self.props.enabled = False
    
    
    read_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/crane/allow_remote"
    write_tag_path = "[MQTT Engine]Zenoh_router_tags/SCADA/crane/allow_remote"
    
    read_value = system.tag.readBlocking([read_tag_path])[0].value
    sent_value = system.tag.readBlocking([write_tag_path])[0].value
    
    int_read_value = int(read_value)
    int_sent_value = int(sent_value)
    
    def send_delayed_command():

        time.sleep(0.5) 
        
        final_value = 2
        	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [final_value])
        self.props.enabled = True

    if int_sent_value == 2:
    	
        system.tag.writeAsync([write_tag_path], [read_value])
        
        
    system.util.invokeAsynchronous(send_delayed_command)
